---
title: "Lovely Lune"
date: 2020-08-06
categories: []
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/tBg11Eik4J4kAFar76TyP23EGZKOuq1dexFfcbMyQ3A-768x576.jpg
---

- Distance: 4.8 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/3875113907)



![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/tBg11Eik4J4kAFar76TyP23EGZKOuq1dexFfcbMyQ3A-768x576.jpg)
